projects.title: NoSaints
projects.subtitle: New Dawn
projects.description: A dark and atmospheric first-person shooter built on narrative and mystery. Set in a world of crumbling cities, towering airships, and fractured alliances, NoSaints tells its story through a unique perspective that puts you at the center of events you barely understand — until you do.
projects.tech: Built in Unity using a feature-oriented MVP architecture with Zenject dependency injection, KINEMATION procedural animation, and ScriptableObject-driven state machines.

projects.title: NoSaints
projects.subtitle: Board Game
projects.description: The NoSaints universe expands beyond the screen. NoSaints Board Game brings the world of fractured alliances, noir intrigue, and strategic combat to the tabletop — a standalone experience set in the same 1930s alternative USA.
projects.tech: Physical card and board game with faction-based mechanics, narrative scenarios, and asymmetric gameplay. Currently in early design and prototyping phase.
